metadata.purpose: Seeded complaints data for YathraRaksha complaint & tracking module
metadata.note: Based on real complaint patterns from MyGov, CPGRAMS, and Kerala CM Distress Cell public reports
sources: CPGRAMS (Centralized Public Grievance Redress And Monitoring System) public data
Kerala CM's Distress Cell Annual Report 2023

complaints.title: Large pothole causing accidents near Kannur bus stand
complaints.description: 3 potholes each about 30cm wide and 8cm deep on NH-66 near Kannur New Bus Stand. Two-wheeler accident happened here on 14-May. Very dangerous.

location.address: NH-66 near Kannur New Bus Stand, Kannur, Kerala

complaints.resolution_note: Patching done by M/s ABC Road Works. 13 days resolution time.

complaints.title: Road completely broken after monsoon - Thalassery
complaints.description: SH-29 road from Thalassery to Iritty has multiple washouts after heavy rain. Road surface gone in 3 places. Trucks stuck.
complaints.source_reference: Kerala CM Distress Cell Complaint No. KL-PWD-2024-8821

complaints.title: Newly built road already cracking - quality issue
complaints.description: The road built 6 months ago under PMGSY in Peravoor panchayat is already cracking badly. Waste of government money. Contractor did poor work.
complaints.action_taken: PMGSY quality investigation team visit ordered

complaints.title: Dangerous pothole on Delhi-Jaipur highway
complaints.description: Big pothole near toll plaza km 48 on NH-48. Car damaged its suspension. Please fix urgently.

location.address: NH-48, Km 48 near Behror Toll Plaza, Rajasthan

complaints.title: Alligator cracking on Mumbai-Goa highway - safety concern
complaints.description: Large section of road cracking in spider-web pattern near Chiplun. About 20 meters length. Road sinking in the middle.

statistics.source_statistics: CPGRAMS Annual Report 2023-24 + NHAI Grievance Dashboard
